title: koeleria montana
intro: Koeleria montana, also known as June grass or mountain hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. Traditionally, Koeleria montana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Koeleria montana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
